title: SneakSprint Toggle
description: Keybinding to toggle sprinting and sneaking.
body:
# SneakSprint Toggle
## What it does
SneakSprint Toggle is a very simple mod to allow you to change your sneaking and sprinting settings on the fly using keybinds.

## Features
- Toggle Sprint toggle (Numpad 7 by default)
- Toggle Sneak toggle (Numpad 8 by default)
- Keybinds are rebindable in control settings.
- A config screen to manually set toggle sneak and toggle sprint.

## Soruce Code
Source code avaliable at: [https://github.com/Lilyy2565/SneakSprint-Toggle](https://github.com/Lilyy2565/SneakSprint-Toggle)
